channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Can the Global South have a say in global affairs?
item.description: China calls for stronger representation for emerging economies.

item.title: World Cup 2026: South Africa grab 1-1 draw with Czechia with late penalty
item.description: Teboho Mokoena equalises through a late penalty to salvage a draw for South Africa in their Group A clash with Czechia.

item.title: Pakistan signs US-Iran MoU
item.description: Pakistan’s Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif signed a US-Iran memorandum of understanding aimed at ending the war.

item.title: Israel says cutting ties with top EU diplomat over ‘apartheid’ comments
item.description: The UN rights office has previously found that Israel is violating international laws that prohibit apartheid.

item.title: Somalia warns Israel against meddling in Somaliland
item.description: The message came after Somaliland opened its first overseas embassy this week, in Jerusalem.

item.title: US vice president slams Israel over criticism of Trump’s Iran deal
item.description: JD Vance slammed members of Israel’s government for criticising US President Donald Trump over his Iran deal efforts.

item.title: Grief, tears as families hold rites for Indian sailors killed in US strike
item.description: Grief, tears as families hold last rites for Indian sailors killed in US strike.

item.title: Zimbabwe lawmakers back bill to extend president’s term in office
item.description: Lower house of parliament passes legislation to extend presidential terms from five to seven years.

item.title: Giant Messi portrait carved into a Philippine beach for the World Cup
item.description: A Filipino artist has created a giant sand portrait of Lionel Messi on a beach in Tandag, Philippines.

item.title: Southern Lebanon residents doubt US-Iran agreement will bring lasting calm
item.description: Residents of southern Lebanon expressed scepticism that hostilities would end after the US-Iran MoU to end the war.

item.title: JD Vance tells Israel ‘you can’t kill your way out’ of security problems
item.description: US vice president defends Iran war MoU, framing war as victory for Washington regardless of negotiation outcome.

item.title: US Supreme Court eases restrictions on drug users owning firearms
item.description: Court sides unanimously with marijuana user who argued law barring him from owning firearms violated US Constitution.

item.title: More than 1,000 killed in Israel attacks on Gaza since ceasefire
item.description: An Israeli attack on a vehicle in Gaza City has killed at least three Palestinians.

item.title: Israel kills at least three Palestinians in Gaza City drone strike
item.description: Gaza's Health Ministry says at least 1,007 Palestinians have been killed by Israel since the so-called 'ceasefire'.

item.title: What we know so far about the US-Iran ceremony in Switzerland
item.description: Talks expected to begin at the Qatar-owned Burgenstock Resort in Switzerland.

item.title: Is the G7 hearing the Global South?
item.description: The G7, BRICS and emerging powers are competing for influence in a changing global order.

item.title: Lebanon Latest: Tensions remain despite US-Iran deal
item.description: Residents return home as a fragile ceasefire takes hold across southern Lebanon.

item.title: Niger says soldiers, civilians killed in armed attack on Niamey airport
item.description: Ministry of Defence says 11 soldiers, 2 civilians and 22 attackers killed in Diori Hamani International Airport assault.

item.title: US progressive Lewis George on track to become DC mayor after Trump threats
item.description: The Democratic Socialist has vowed aggressive response to Trump, who has said he could 'take back' DC if she wins.

item.title: Continuity or change? What to know about Colombia’s run-off election
item.description: Far-right Abelardo de la Espriella and leftist Ivan Cepeda compete for the presidency on starkly different platforms.

item.title: How does Trump’s MOU with Iran compare with Obama’s nuclear pact?
item.description: Trump promised a better deal than the 2015 JCPOA nuclear agreement with Iran - but is it?

item.title: World Cup: Ivory Coast’s Elye Wahi denied Canada entry for Germany match
item.description: Wahi was unauthorised for travel after he was reportedly arrested last month in a French spot-fixing investigation.

item.title: World Cup 2026: Day seven
item.description: Al Jazeera’s @RahulP_Journo has your #FIFAworldcup26 day 7 recap.

item.title: Trump-Netanyahu tensions: Have Israeli and US leaders clashed before?
item.description: Media reports talk about rifts between Israeli and American leaders, but it has not changed US policy towards Israel.

item.title: These are the Palestinians that Israel has killed during Gaza’s ‘ceasefire’
item.description: Israel has killed more than 1,000 Palestinians since agreeing to a US-brokered ‘ceasefire’ in its genocidal war.
